# NSLAB Post-seal Postmortem — 2024-12-04

## Seal and outcome access

Blind packet was sealed before outcome snapshot download. Outcome snapshot was downloaded and parsed only in `PHASE_3_OPEN_OUTCOME_ONLY_AFTER_SEAL`.

## Reading

The pre-seal market-state lane captured the dominant day mechanism: martial-law shock, market-normal-open confirmation, liquidity backstop, and impeachment/transition probability compressed attention into political theme proxies. The direct issuer lane was not wrong as evidence, but it was slower than the political beta wave. No post-seal leader without a cutoff source hit receives an invented catalyst; those records remain newsless/unexplained learning cases.

      "economic_mechanism": "계엄 해제 직후 탄핵/정권교체 확률이 전면화되면, 한국 소형주 수급은 먼저 정치 테마의 가장 오래된 표식으로 달려간다. 동신건설은 직접 영업 뉴스가 아니라 이재명 테마 베타와 P일 3D 양호 흐름을 타는 후보다.",
